slug: 讟讗讜诪讟讗讜讜拽讗讟讗谞讙讬讛谞讙拽讜讗讜讜讗讜讜讟诪讟讗驻讜拽讗讬讜讜谞讜讗拽讬讟讗谞讗讟讗讛讜

sections.paragraph:
feminine noun

Taumatawhakatangihangakoauauotamateapokaiwhenuakitanatahu, official name and the Maori name for Taumata, hill that is 1,000 feet (305 meters) high located close to Porangahau in New Zealand (literal meaning " The summit where Tamatea, the man with the big knees, the climber of mountains, the land-swallower who travelled about, played his nose flute to his loved one")
